title: Clay Creature Studio
description: A clay creature builder where kids place body, eyes, horns, wings, spikes, and feet onto ghost outlines.
learningGoals: Connect screen play to real clay making
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap clay parts onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct parts pop, sparkle, and speak the part name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished creatures speak a playful creature line.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder clay part art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
